title: teucrium subtriphyllum var. haenseleri
intro: Teucrium subtriphyllum var. haenseleri, also known as Haensel's germander, is a subspecies of the Teucrium subtriphyllum plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Haensel's germander include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and indigestion, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve immune function. Haensel's germander is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential side effects.
